subject: Production payment processor returning 503 since 14:02 UTC
bodyPreview: Folks — paging the team. Stripe-backed checkout has been returning 503 since 14:02 UTC. Error rate is 6% of attempts. Customer-facing. I'm starting an incident; please join the bridge: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/... and pick up an investigation lane. Will keep posting in #payments-incidents.
